scripts.install: pnpm --prefix ph-lelantos-app install && pnpm --prefix ph-lelantos-cli install
scripts.build: pnpm --prefix ph-lelantos-app build && pnpm --prefix ph-lelantos-app connect:build && pnpm --prefix ph-lelantos-cli build
scripts.test: pnpm --prefix ph-lelantos-app test && pnpm --prefix ph-lelantos-cli test
